items.summary: On the Transaction page form, add a Date field (date input, defaulting to today's date), a 'Previous Balance' field (read-only, auto-filled with the current account balance when an account number is selected), and a 'Total Amount' field (read-only, computed as Previous Balance + Amount for deposits or Previous Balance − Amount for withdrawals). Ensure these fields are visible, clearly labelled, and consistent with the existing colorful card-based mobile-first theme.

Update the backend Motoko transaction data model and addTransaction method to store the transaction date (as a Text or Int timestamp), previous balance (Nat or Float), and total amount (Nat or Float) fields if they are not already stored. Ensure existing CRUD methods (getTransactionsByAccount, getAllTransactions, getTransactionsByDateRange) return these new fields.
